summary:
## Week in Review: 2026-03-30 to 2026-04-05

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 6.3.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.0 (-22.2% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.03)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 1.6 (-21.4% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.32)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.0 (-30.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.21)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 6.3 (-56.4% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.11)
